f132d899848a.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
f132d899848a.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
f132d899848a.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

2e3dde7cc06d.title: Close the hygiene gap — 3 to 5
2e3dde7cc06d.description: An FSA rating of 3 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
2e3dde7cc06d.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

39ac3165faa2.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
39ac3165faa2.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

c8c3bde9f4f4.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
c8c3bde9f4f4.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
c8c3bde9f4f4.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

407d9ba742dc.title: Strong rating masks weak competitive position
407d9ba742dc.description: Your 4.6/5 Google rating feels dominant but you sit below the local median (P23.5). Peer venues achieve similar or better ratings — in this market, 4.5 is table stakes, not a differentiator. Don't mistake the number for an advantage.
407d9ba742dc.management_implication: The rating looks good in isolation but not in context.

df991878e536.title: Guest experience outpaces formal trust record
df991878e536.description: Guests enjoy the venue but the compliance record hasn't kept up. One poor inspection would make a private gap public. The fix is proactive compliance work, not more marketing.
df991878e536.expected_upside: Close the gap before it becomes visible

a5535d342734.title: Ranked #14 of 18 locally — peers are ahead
a5535d342734.description: At percentile 23.5, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

0597792c207a.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
0597792c207a.description: You trail peers by 2.3 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

e6d19410d6fd.title: Protect the 4.6/5 rating — it took years to build
e6d19410d6fd.description: With 416 reviews at 4.6/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
